info.name: Amadeus Retrieves a Unique Flight by Search Criteria.

params.name: flightNumber
params.description: 1 to 4-digit number of the flight. e.g. 4537

params.name: scheduledDepartureDate
params.description: scheduled departure date of the flight, local to the departure airport, format YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: operationalSuffix
params.description: 1-letter operational suffix assigned by the carrier to differentiate flight in case of delay changing the departure date e.g. A

items.docs: Amadeus Retrieves a Unique Flight by Search Criteria.
